title: Flat Man's Pebbles
description: Flattens the pebbles found in No Man's Land to be consistent with the Seashells.
body: Converts the pebbles found in [No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land) to remain consistent with the seashells also found within it. Textures were inspired by [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs).
